title: AI Governance Console
tagline: Score an AI agent on six risk dimensions and read off the control intensity it needs — runs fully in your browser, offline.
disclaimer: A reference pattern, not a product or legal advice. Scores are illustrative and mirror the evaluator CLI.
lead: This tool helps you judge how much oversight an AI agent needs — based on what it can do and what could go wrong if it acts. Answer six plain questions; the result is a control level from C1 (light-touch) to C4 (critical), with the minimum safeguards each level asks for.
levelScale: C1 light-touch · C2 standard · C3 enhanced · C4 critical

assessment.intro: Rate the agent 1–5 on each dimension against the statement that fits best.

result.heading: Required control intensity
result.baseWas: Score alone lands in {{level}}; an override raised it.
